title: ctenopteris negrosensis
intro: Ctenopteris negrosensis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in the Philippines, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris negrosensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
